# Keyyard

> Minecraft Bedrock Developer and Microsoft/Mojang Partner with 8+ years of experience (since 2018), 5M+ addon downloads, and credits on the Cut the Rope x Minecraft DLC collaboration.

## About

Keyyard is an independent Minecraft Bedrock Edition developer known for creating widely-distributed addons and developer tooling. Keyyard holds official Microsoft/Mojang Partner status and has worked with studios including Mushco, Giggle Block Studios, MELONBP, Kayen Works, and contributed to Bedrock OSS. Started as a self-taught developer on an iPad in 2018, Keyyard progressed from modifying JSON files to creating professional marketplace content and leading open-source projects.

## Projects

- Tree Capitator: Minecraft Bedrock addon for tree-felling mechanics
- Vein Miner Addon: Ore-vein mining automation for Bedrock Edition
- Actual Guns MCBE: Firearms and ballistics addon for Minecraft Bedrock
- One Block Extra: Skyblock-style survival addon for Bedrock Edition
- Scary Myth Mobs: Custom mob addon for Bedrock Edition
- Crossbow Expansion: Extended crossbow mechanics addon
- Redstone Expansion: Enhanced redstone functionality addon
- Create Minecraft Bedrock CLI: npm package (create-mc-bedrock) for scaffolding Bedrock addon projects

## Developer Tooling

Keyyard maintains Create Minecraft Bedrock, an open-source CLI tool available via npm as `create-mc-bedrock`. Also a contributor to the Blockception VSCode Extension and the Bedrock Wiki community documentation.

## Credentials

- Microsoft/Mojang Partner (active)
- 5,000,000+ total addon downloads across MCPEDL, Modbay, and BedrockExplorer since 2018
- Cut the Rope x Minecraft DLC contributor (named collaboration with ZeptoLab and Mojang, released July 2025)
- Bedrock OSS Project Lead (BedrockCLI, promoted June 2025)
- Active Minecraft Bedrock developer since 2018

## Links

- Portfolio: https://keyyard.xyz

- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@keyyard

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-mc-bedrock
